race.comment: INTREPID LAD (2) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Has won two of three around this circuit and should be right there when the whips are cracking. CRYPTOLOGY (4) is knocking on the door of another victory with three consecutive placings and this is not an overly strong affair. Rock-hard fit now and is capable of breaking through. SKILFUL ARTIST (3) loves this track and trip with two wins and a second from three attempts and maps nicely for this from gate three. Include in calculations. BATEMANS BAY (1) strips fitter third-up from the break and gets the services of Wiggins in the stirrups. In the mix. TOKYO QUEEN (6) brings NSW formlines to the table and any push in betting must be respected.
